description_long: This is a medium-sized, open-topped cardboard box with two flaps extended outward and two flaps folded down inside. The box is brown and features a bold black stencil on one side that reads 'NOT A TELEPORTER', along with a small recycling symbol in the lower corner. The cardboard appears to be corrugated, giving the box a slightly textured, matte finish. The interior is visible, showing the same brown color as the exterior, and the box is empty. The overall shape is slightly irregular, with some subtle bends and creases typical of a used or handled cardboard box.
description: A brown, open cardboard box with two flaps up, 'NOT A TELEPORTER' stenciled on one side, and a recycling symbol.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open box with two flaps up, 'NOT A TELEPORTER' text, and a recycling symbol.
description_view_1: Side view with both flaps visible, no text or symbols, showing the box's depth.
description_view_2: Rear view of the box with two flaps up, no visible markings or text.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, with no text or symbols visible.
